text.title: Dev Methodologies — Architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Endpoint hits the DB 200 times for a 20-item list; latency p95 = 800ms.
antipattern.fix: select_related on FK chains; prefetch_related on reverse-FK; assert query count < 5 in test.

antipattern.symptom: Stale data persists weeks after source-of-truth changed.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treated cache as KV store.
antipattern.fix: Mandate TTL on every set; lint cache.set without a TTL argument.

antipattern.symptom: Retry of charge_user job double-charges customers.
antipattern.fix: Pass idempotency_key=request_id; persist 'processed' marker before side effect.
